inputs.label: Applied Stress
inputs.businessContext: The sustained mechanical stress acting on the material, in megapascals.

businessContext_i18n.en: The sustained mechanical stress acting on the material, in megapascals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemeye etki eden sürekli mekanik gerilme, megapaskal cinsinden.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Absolute operating temperature of the component in Kelvin.

businessContext_i18n.en: Absolute operating temperature of the component in Kelvin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bileşenin mutlak çalışma sıcaklığı, Kelvin cinsinden.

inputs.label: Material Constant A
inputs.businessContext: Pre‑exponential factor, a material‑dependent strength parameter (units: MPa⁻ⁿ s⁻¹).

businessContext_i18n.en: Pre‑exponential factor, a material‑dependent strength parameter (units: MPa⁻ⁿ s⁻¹).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Üstel öncesi faktör, malzemeye bağlı bir dayanım parametresi (birim: MPa⁻ⁿ s⁻¹).

inputs.label: Stress Exponent
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless exponent describing the stress sensitivity of the creep rate (typically 3–8 for metals).

businessContext_i18n.en: Dimensionless exponent describing the stress sensitivity of the creep rate (typically 3–8 for metals).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürünme hızının gerilme duyarlılığını tanımlayan boyutsuz üs (metaller için tipik olarak 3–8).

inputs.label: Activation Energy
inputs.businessContext: Activation energy for creep deformation, material property in joules per mole.

businessContext_i18n.en: Activation energy for creep deformation, material property in joules per mole.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sürünme deformasyonu için aktivasyon enerjisi, malzeme özelliği, joule/mol cinsinden.

inputs.label: Gas Constant
inputs.businessContext: Universal gas constant; may be adjusted for different unit systems.

businessContext_i18n.en: Universal gas constant; may be adjusted for different unit systems.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Evrensel gaz sabiti; farklı birim sistemleri için ayarlanabilir.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
